false, "clickable": true, "abs-pos": true, "class": "android.widget.Button", "visible-to-user": false, "package": "com.problemio", "enabled": true, "bounds": [35, 7984, 1405, 2392], "pressed": "not_pressed", "scrollable-vertical": false}, {"text": "This is arguably one of the more important sections of a real business plan.  In this section you outline the details of each transaction, estimate how many transactions you can expect, and understand your financial model. This is the early version of profit and revenue forecasting for your business. Do not start a business without really thinking through this section. It is extremely important.       

This happens to be one of the most complicated sections of the business plan so here is an example below, and a further explanation of this topic on the business economics page which you can get to by pressing the button right above.      

Here is a quick example: imagine you are opening or selling a widget.  You sell the widget for a certain price, but it takes you some amount of time and money to produce, market, and sell the widget, while incurring costs like paying your employees and rent.  So there is revenue and expenses.  Expenses are easier to count because most of them are fixed.  

Your job is to figure out the number of widgets you need to sell in order to 1) break even, 2) turn a profit, 3) reach your other goals.", "resource-id": "com.problemio:id/unit_economics_text", "adapter-view": false, "pointer": "25e8553", "scrollable-horizontal": false, "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "selected": false, "content-desc": [null], "rel-bounds": [0, 7980, 1440, 9660], "draw": false, "focusable": false, "long-clickable": false, "visibility": "visible", "focused": false, "clickable": false, "abs-pos": true, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "visible-to-user": false, "package": "com.problemio", "enabled": true, "bounds": [0, 8152, 1440, 2392], "pressed": "not_pressed", "scrollable-vertical": false}, {"text": "9) CURRENT TEAM", "resource-id": "com.problemio:id/team_heading", "adapter-view": false, "pointer": "103e90", "scrollable-horizontal": false, "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "selected": false, "content-desc": [null], "rel-bounds": [0, 9660, 1440, 9761], "draw": false, "focusable": false, "long-clickable": false, "visibility": "visible", "focused": false, "clickable": false, "abs-pos": true, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "visible-to-user": false, "package": "com.problemio", "enabled": true, "bounds": [0, 9832, 1440, 2392], "pressed": "not_pressed", "scrollable-vertical": false}, {"text": "Give a brief background about each of the members of your executive team and discuss the current size of the team. Do not get into too much detail.  You will have a chance to get into details in the subsequent sections.  

Here, just help the reader understand what your product is, and a little bit about your vision for the product.", "resource-id": "com.problemio:id/exec_summary_text", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 637, 1440, 1063], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "2) YOUR PRODUCT OR SERVICE", "resource-id": "com.problemio:id/product_heading", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 1063, 1440, 1164], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "How to think through product strategy", "resource-id": "com.problemio:id/product_strategy_button", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": true, "class": "android.widget.Button", "bounds": [35, 1164, 1405, 1332], "componentLabel": "Text Button"}, {"text": "This is the place to be more precise about your product. Mention what the product is. Is it a website? A physical store? A widget or a mobile app?      

Why should the company exist? Does it entertain? Does it make someone feel better?  Does it solve a problem for someone?  Does it teach something? What is the benefit of this company?      

In this section, help the reader understand why your company needs to exist in the world.", "resource-id": "com.problemio:id/product_text", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 1332, 1440, 2088], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "3) WHAT STAGE ARE YOU IN?", "resource-id": "com.problemio:id/stage_heading", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 2088, 1440, 2189], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "Learn About Company Stages", "resource-id": "com.problemio:id/company_stage_button", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": true, "class": "android.widget.Button", "bounds": [35, 2189, 1405, 2357], "componentLabel": "Text Button"}, {"text": "Are you in the idea stage? Or have you started and you maybe have a prototype? Or do you already have some revenue and a team?      

Do not get into too many specifics here, but simply help the reader understand where you are in the process of building a company.    

It is ok to be at any stage, even the planning stage. Some of the biggest companies in the world have at some point been in planning stages.  The purpose of this section is to help the reader gain context and perspective.
